description: A wind tunnel test engineer at a university research lab needs to update the eCRM-001 wing's airfoil sections to match a revised aerodynamic specification. Open the existing model /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 in OpenVSP. Modify the main Wing component so that the root cross-section uses a Four Series (NACA 4-digit) airfoil matching NACA 4415, and the outermost tip cross-section uses a Four Series airfoil matching NACA 2410. Save the modified model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_resectioned.vsp3.
